nasb.text: their wings touched one another; their faces did not turn when they moved, each went straight forward.

esv.text: their wings touched one another. Each one of them went straight forward, without turning as they went.

cnv.text: 牠們的翅膀互相接觸，走動的時候，不必轉身，都是朝著臉孔的方向行走。

ccb.text: 翅膀彼此相连。他们移动时不必转身，各朝前面移动。
